title: XAU/USD is still bleeding. I've been short all week. +$412 today. RR 3.59.
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Gold opened the week exactly where it closed last week.

Weak. Under the EMA 200. No buyers in sight.

Same story, same structure, same trade.

What the 15M was showing : — EMA 200 flat and above price — no reclaim attempt — Supply zone holding perfectly — sellers still in control — Price compressing before the breakdown — Tight stop, clean invalidation

Setup : Stop : 0.174% / $8,205 risk Target : 0.624% / $29,418 RR : 3.59

Result : +$412

Six trades on XAU in two weeks. All shorts. All structured.

The trend doesn't care about your opinion. It just keeps going.

Still trying to long gold or finally going with the flow?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
Same process every time — I validate the setup through an AI tool I've been building before entering.

Upload a chart screenshot, it reads the structure, scores the setup, identifies SL/TP levels. Keeps me from trading against the trend.

Two weeks on XAU : +$135 / +$236 / +$472 / +$126 / +$463 / +$412. All documented here.

Free to try : [https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com)
